name: Google Sync
tagline: Effortlessly synchronize your chats and settings with Google Drive.
notice: Note: Your session will be automatically refreshed while your Google account is active. You may need to re-login if your Google session expires. To avoid your cloud data being overwritten, do not use Weavelet Canvas on more than one device at the same time.
privacy: Your privacy is important to us. To protect it, Weavelet Canvas only requests non-sensitive access, which means it can only create, view, and manage its own files and folders.
